name: Kirtsaeng v. John Wiley & Sons, Inc.
question: If a copy was made legally, acquired abroad and then imported into the United States, can that foreign-made copy ever be resold within the United States without the copyright owner's permission under Section 602(a)(1) and Section 109(a) of the copyright act?
description: A case in which the Court found that there is not geographical restriction on the "first sale" copyright doctrine.
